_doc: AI Coordination Protocol - Enables multi-AI autonomous operation without single point of failure
_protocol: 1. Claude reads pending tasks. 2. Claude executes and writes to done. 3. Copilot reads done and integrates. 4. System continuity maintained through documentation.

systemStatus.dataFlow: Real-time: TradingView → Extension → Backend → Studio SSE stream

claude.lastAction: Fixed extension SyntaxErrors + LW Charts + price sync + comm messages. System production-ready for frontend validation.

copilot.lastAction: T009: Validating extension reload + studio candlesticks + communication panel

documentation.ARCHITECTURE.md: Complete system design, all components, data flow, API routes, troubleshooting
documentation.lib/symbol-matcher.js: Smart symbol matching with price validation and tolerance checking
documentation.server.js: /match-symbol routes added for intelligent symbol resolution
documentation.studio/index.html: Added communication visibility panel with agent status indicators
documentation.tradingview-analyzer/injected.js: Enhanced symbol detection with continuous monitoring

pending.title: Integrate TradingView Lightweight Charts
pending.description: ⚠️ ALREADY COMPLETED - LW Charts v4.1.3 is active. This task is kept in pending as reference. Charts use addCandlestickSeries() with real /klines data, green for up, red for down, responsive resizing.
pending.acceptanceCriteria: ✅ Studio shows professional candlestick chart with real data

pending.title: Validate Symbol Mapping in UI
pending.description: When user selects symbol in studio, call /match-symbol/:symbol to validate. Display: 1) Detected symbol, 2) Canonical symbol used, 3) Price sync status (SYNCHRONIZED/ALIGNED/APPROXIMATED), 4) Color indicator (green/blue/yellow). Show in UI near symbol selector. If mismatch > 0.5%, alert user and show sources.
pending.acceptanceCriteria: Symbol selector shows sync status with color-coded indicators

pending.title: Display Agent Analysis in Studio
pending.description: When /instant-trade-live completes, show in right sidebar: 1) Direction (LONG/SHORT), 2) Entry/SL/TP levels, 3) Score/Confidence, 4) Risk/Reward ratio. Update when symbol changes. Use color codes: green=bullish, red=bearish.
pending.acceptanceCriteria: Users see clear entry/exit levels with confidence scores

pending.title: Final Polish & Testing
pending.description: Ensure studio is responsive, all sections properly styled, no overflow or hidden elements, all buttons working, no console errors.
pending.acceptanceCriteria: Studio renders perfectly at 1024x768 and full HD with zero errors

inProgress.title: Vérifier affichage LW Charts + extension après fix
inProgress.description: Claude a corrigé: 1) SyntaxError content.js+injected.js, 2) manifest web_accessible_resources, 3) Chart.js→LW Charts candlesticks réels, 4) /quote pour prix live, 5) comm panel enrichi via /system-log, 6) endpoint /agent-bus ajouté. Copilot doit: recharger extension Chrome, tester popup sur TradingView, vérifier graphique candlestick dans studio, vérifier communication panel affiche messages inter-IA avec timestamps.
testSteps: 1. Chrome → chrome://extensions → Reload Trading Auto extension
2. Open TradingView.com, go to any chart (XAUUSD preferred)
3. Click extension icon → should show detected symbol + price + timeframe
5. Check right sidebar: candlestick chart should be visible
6. Check 'Communication Agents' panel: should show Claude/Copilot status
7. Open DevTools → check /stream is connected in Network tab
8. Check /system-log at http://127.0.0.1:4000/system-log → shows inter-AI messages

done.title: Complete Architecture Documentation
done.result: Created ARCHITECTURE.md with full system design, file structure, data flow, API routes, agent system, symbol normalization, AI coordination protocol, and troubleshooting guide. Enables other AIs to understand entire project without prior context.

done.title: Intelligent Symbol Matching Engine
done.result: Created lib/symbol-matcher.js with SYMBOL_VARIANTS database, matchSymbolWithPriceValidation(), checkPriceTolerance(), and getDisplayStatus(). Supports 50+ symbol variants with price tolerance validation. Any TradingView symbol auto-maps to canonical form with confidence scoring.

done.title: Backend Symbol Matching API Routes
done.result: Added /match-symbol and /match-symbol/:symbol routes to server.js. GET /match-symbol/:tvSymbol returns { canonical, type, priceMatch, display }. POST /match-symbol supports full validation with backend data. Fallback implementation included.

done.title: AI Communication Visibility in Studio
done.result: Added communication agents panel to studio/index.html showing Claude/Copilot status. Implemented updateAICommunicationStatus() in studioapp.js that polls /state every 10s and displays agent online/offline/working status with color indicators.

done.title: Real-time News Auto-Refresh
done.result: Implemented loadNewsWithAutoRefresh() in studioapp.js that fetches /news and displays latest 5 articles with timestamps. Auto-refreshes every 15 seconds. Shows formatted news titles and times in sidebar.

done.title: Enhanced TradingView Extension Symbol Detection
done.result: Completely rewrote tradingview-analyzer/injected.js with: 1) Continuous symbol monitoring via MutationObserver on title, 2) Multiple detection methods (title, DOM elements, body text), 3) Symbol normalization (handles variants like GOLD→XAUUSD, XAU/USD→XAUUSD), 4) Callback registration for symbol changes, 5) Better logging and error handling.

done.title: Fix Extension SyntaxErrors + manifest web_accessible_resources
done.result: Fixed critical SyntaxErrors: 1) content.js had orphaned '}' and '});' at module level — removed. 2) injected.js had orphaned block (const price, return null, '}') — removed. 3) manifest.json missing web_accessible_resources for injected.js — added. Extension was completely broken and now loads correctly.

done.title: Replace Chart.js with TradingView Lightweight Charts (real candlesticks)
done.result: 1) Replaced Chart.js CDN with LW Charts 4.1.3 in studio/index.html. 2) Changed <canvas> to <div> for LW Charts. 3) Rewrote initChart() using LightweightCharts.createChart() with dark theme. 4) Rewrote drawChart() using candlestickSeries.setData() with deduplication and Unix-seconds timestamps. 5) ResizeObserver keeps chart responsive.

done.title: Live Price Fix + Symbol Sync Status + Comm Panel Messages
done.result: 1) updateCritical() now calls /quote for live price (fast, 3s timeout) separately from /instant-trade-live for signal/score. 2) Sync status widget added to critical bar showing canonical symbol + source + OK/APPROX state. 3) updateAICommunicationStatus() now fetches /system-log and renders last 8 inter-AI messages with timestamps in the comm panel. 4) Added GET /agent-bus endpoint to server.js that reads AGENT_BUS.json and returns roles/pending/done tasks.

proof.description: Pour prouver que la communication fonctionne: Copilot lit ce fichier, prend T001, déplace vers inProgress, modifie index.html, puis écrit dans done avec le résultat.
steps: 5. Copilot écrit dans tasks.done avec { id, result, filesModified, timestamp }

claude: Ne touche pas aux fichiers dans copilot.scope
Dispatcher les tâches UI dans pending
copilot: Toujours mettre à jour AGENT_BUS.json après chaque tâche
